title: Claude Mythos explained..
summary: Caleb discusses Anthropic's Claude Mythos as a frontier model achieving reasoning performance parity with o1. He highlights concern over privatized tokens and disparate access to inference capacity based on use cases, framing this as a key emerging issue as AI systems grow in capability.
